label: Example
info: Hello-world reference flow. You can delete this tab when you are done.

name: Say hello
func:
msg.payload = { message: 'Hello from Node-RED!' };
return msg;

label: Orchestration
info:
Main business process flow.
Build the happy path here: order intake → routing → payment → inventory → notification → response.
Also wire in the error paths that lead to the Error Handling tab.

name:
TODO: Define your entry point
(e.g. POST /order or POST /checkout)

TODO: Content-Based Router
Route by orderType (standard / express / b2b)
Use a switch node or routing logic here.
Do NOT implement all logic in a single function node.

TODO: Call Payment Service
POST /payment/authorize
Include correlationId in header and body

TODO: Call Inventory Service
POST /inventory/reserve
Only call if payment succeeded

TODO: Call Notification Service
POST /notification/send
Only call if inventory reserved

TODO: Return orchestration result
Include { orderId, correlationId, status, trace: [...] }

label: Error Handling
info:
Compensation and error flows.
Wire these nodes into the Orchestration tab when a step fails.
Compensation must run in REVERSE ORDER of the steps that succeeded.

name:
TODO: Compensation Step 1
Release Inventory
POST /inventory/release
Run this FIRST if shipping/notification failed after inventory reserved

TODO: Compensation Step 2
Refund Payment
POST /payment/refund
Run this SECOND (after inventory released, or if inventory failed)

TODO: Dead Letter Channel
Handle unrecoverable failures
(e.g. compensation itself fails, or max retries exceeded)
TODO: Log dead letter for admin inspection

label: Admin
info:
Health check and debugging endpoints.
The /health endpoint is already wired and working.
Add a /trace/:orderId endpoint to help debug your orchestration flow.

name: Health response
